publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

sourceDesc.p: Work of the literatures of Ethiopia and Eritrea

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Updatedlist of witnesses and edition with textparts for all attested commemorations

div.label: First half of the year
div.note: This record lists all commemorations attested at least once in all known manuscripts of this recension containing the first half of the year or part of it. It therefore does not represent an articulation of commemorations as present in a specific witness. The commemorations of each manuscript are described in the respective manuscript records. Commemorations which deviate from the standard of commemorations attested in all manuscripts are indicated as 'non-standard'.

div.label: Commemorative notices for the month of Maskaram
Decapitation of St John the Baptist
Commemoration of the council of Alexandria under Dionysios of Alexandria
Commemoration of an earthquake in Egypt
Commemoration of Sofyā, different version in the second recension.
Commemoration of ʾAgātu, Ṗeṭros, Yoḥannǝs, ʾAmon, ʾAmonā, Rafiqā
Commemoration (sic) of Maqārǝs and the celebration of the birth of Mary in Upper Egypt
Commemoration of the council of Ephesus
Commemoration of ʾAflāhos and his companions
Commemoration of a miracle of Basil of Caesarea.
Commemoration of the translatio of St Stephen the Protomartyr.
Commemoration of the consecration of the temple in Jerusalem.
Commemoration of Cyprian of Antioch and Justina.
Birth of St John the Baptist.
Commemoration of the miracle of the salvation of Athanasius.
Commemorative notices for the month of Ṭǝqǝmt
Commemoration of Sǝmʿon, patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of Ṗāwlos, patriarch of Constantinople
div.note: The commemorated patriarch is called in Yoḥannǝs in No item: LIT4032SenkessarS.

div.label: Commemoration of ʾabbā Hor, Susǝnnā and her children
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAgāton (originally part of the previous commemoration)
Commemoration of ʾabbā Goton, patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of Fārbu, ʾAbulu and Ṗeṭros
Commemoration of the council of Antioch
Commemoration of the translatio of Lazarus
Commemoration of Joseph I or Yoḥannǝs
Commemoration of Diyonāsyos, bishop of Qorotos
Commemoration of Ṗāwlos and his friend and Zenā (non-standard)
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Julius of Aqfahs
Commemoration of Maqārǝs, bishop of ʾIdku
Commemoration of the birth of Dǝmeṭrǝyos
Commemorative notices for the month of Ḫǝdar
Commemoration of Maksimos, Numanfyos, Fiqṭor and Filǝṗṗos
Commemoration of Peter III of Alexandria or Ṗāwlos
Commemoration of ʾAtnāsyos and his sister ʾIrāʾi
Commemoration of Yoḥannǝs and Yāʿqob, bishops of Fārs
Commemoration of Tomās, bishop of Damāsqo
Commemoration of Ṭimotewos, translatio of Tewodros
Commemoration of Filǝṗṗos, patriarch of Rome
Commemoration of the apparition at Qʷǝsqʷām
Commemoration of ʾabbā Minās, bishop of Tǝmay
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of St George of Lydda
Commemoration of ʾabbā Yǝsḥāq, patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the council of Nicaea
Commemoration of Sofyā and her daughters
Commemoration of the council at the time of king Fiqṭoryos
Commemoration of ʾArsǝwo and ʾElsāʿ the prophet
Commemoration of Michael, history of Dortāwos and Tāwobǝstā
Commemoration of ʾabbā Ṭimotewos or Mātewos
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of ʾabbā Nāfǝr
Commemoration of the death of John Chrysostom
Commemoration of the church of Sargis
Commemorative notices for the month of Tāḫśāś
Commemoration of Ṗeṭros, the bishop of Gazā
Commemoration of the presentation of Mary to the temple
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAbrǝhām or Mar Bǝhnām
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾEsi and his sister Teklā
Commemoration of the translatio of Sāwiros
Commemoration of the council of Rome
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝḥur and ʾabbā Minās and Marbǝhnām
Commemoration of the translatio of Luqās the stylite
Commemoration of the translatio of Titus
Commemoration of Yoḥannǝs of Burlǝs or Qoṗros
Commemoration of the Ḥagge the prophet
Commemoration of ʾAgnǝsṭǝsyos, patriarch of Antioch
Commemoration of Filgonyos, patriarch of Antioch
Commemoration of the birth of Christ
Commemoration of the martyrs of ʾAnsǝnā
Second commemoration of the birth of Christ
Commemorative notices for the month of Ṭǝrr
Commemoration of St Stephen the Protomartyr
Commemoration of ʾabbā Tāʾonā, patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the children of Bethlehem
Commemoration of the translatio of Elijah
Commemoration of ʾabbā Mǝrkǝyānos the patriarch
Commemoration of Ṗeṭros the patriarch of Rome
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of ʾabbā Maqārǝs
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾƎndǝryāniqos the patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝnyāmin the patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the institution of two fasting days in case Christmas or Epiphany fall on a Wednesday or Friday
Commemoration of the baptism of Christ
Commemoration of the wedding at Qānā
Commemoration of Gregory of Nyssa among the Egyptians
Commemoration of Bahor and his sister Surā
Commemoration of Marbǝhnām and consecration of the church of Yoḥannǝs
Commemoration of the death of St Mary
Commemoration of an unnamed martyr or Saklā
Commemoration of the translatio of Ṭimotewos
Commemoration of Bistis, Halǝbis, ʾAqābis and their mother Sofyā
Commemorative notices for the month of Yakkātit
Commemoration of the council of Constantinople
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Ṗeṭros
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAqrǝṗṗā the patriarch
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝsoy and ʾabbā Nob
Commemoration of the translatio of the 49 martyrs of Scetis
Commemoration of ʾAbuqer, Yoḥannǝs, three virgins and their mother
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾƎskǝndǝros the patriarch
Commemoration of ʾabbā Tewodros the patriarch
Commemoration of the presentation of Christ to the temple
Commemoration of James, son of Alphaeus
Commemoration of Bǝlātyānos the patriarch of Rome
Commemoration of ʾabbā Ṭimotewos the patriarch
Commemoration of Yāʿqob the patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of the martyrs of Sǝbǝsṭyā
Commemoration of Malāniwos the patriarch of Antiochia
Commemoration of the translatio of Martǝyānos
Commemoration of Bāsǝlyos, Tāʾodǝs and Ṭimotewos
Commemoration of Gabrǝʾel, Patriarch of Ethiopia, and of Marqorewos of Dabra Ḥaraykǝwā (non-standard)
Commemoration of Ṭimotewos the bishop of Gāzā
Commemoration of ʾArsinos, Filmona and Lekiyā
Commemoration of a deacon and Minās
Commemoration of ʾEnsǝgtewos, patriarch of Antioch
Commemoration of the invention of the head of St John the Baptist
Second half of the year
div.note: This record lists all commemorations which are attested in at least one of all currently known witnesses of group B for the second half of the year: No item: EMIP01859, No item: EMML4398, No item: EMML6952, No item: EStzm002, No item: ESqdq004, and No item: ESam019. Commemorations which are not common to all witnesses of the respective day are marked as non-standard. The commemorations of each manuscript are described in the respective manuscript records.

div.label: Commemorative notices for the month of Maggābit
Introduction for the second half of the year, beginning with Maggābit
Commemoration of the Council of Ǧazīra Banī ʿUmar
Commemoration of ʾAndyānos, his wife, ʾAwsābyos, ʾArmā and forty martyrs
Commemoration of Demetrius I of Alexandria
Commemoration of the Forty Martyrs of Sebaste
Commemoration of Giyorgis, Talāsyos and Yosef
Consecration of the Church of ʾAsqarān
Commemoration of the Anointing of Jesus
Commemoration of the priests' conspiracy to kill Lazarus
Commemoration of the Annunciation and Resurrection (non-standard)
Commemoration of the ascension of Yāʿqob
Commemorative notices for the month of Miyāzyā
Commemoration of the miraculous protection of the Wādī an-Naṭrūn from Arab invaders
Commemoration of Fiqṭor, Dākiyos, ʾAbreni and others
Apparition of Jesus Christ to Thomas
Commemoration of ʾAgāṗis, ʾAyreni and Sanonyā
Commemoration of a miracle at the hand of Shenute of Atripe
Commemoration of ʾƎlaskǝndǝros, bishop of Jerusalem
Commemoration of ʾƎnṭonyos, bishop of Ṭamawā
Commemoration of ʾabbā Yǝsǝʿ and ʾabbā Yosef, disciples of Milyos
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of St Nicholas in Alexandria
Commemoration of James son of Zebedee
Commemoration of Sǝmʿon of ʾArmānya, bishop of Fārs
Commemoration of Mārqos, Patriarch of Alexandria (non-standard)
Commemoration of St George of Lydda
Commemoration of Babnodā, Tāʾudarǝs and martyrs in ʾAlʿāgam
Commemoration of the birth of Mark
Commemorative notices for the month of Gǝnbot
Commemoration of the birth of St Mary
Commemoration of the ascension of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of Three Youths in the Furnace
Commemoration of an apparition of the cross in Jerusalem (non-standard)
Commemoration of Yulyānos and his mother
Commemoration of a miracle by ʾAbuqalamsis (non-standard)
Commemoration of the arrival of Jesus Christ in Egypt
Commemoration of the translatio of the body of Epiphanius of Salamis
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ (non-standard)
Commemorative notices for the month of Sane
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Lāwǝnitwos
Commemoration of Qozmān of Ṭaḥ and his companions
Commemoration of the discovery of the relics of St John the Baptist and Elisha
Commemoration of the reopening of the church of Mary in Zawela
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Mary in Mǝḥḍāb
Commemoration of Māmādā and her children, ʾArmānos and his mother
Commemoration of Lokyānos and four martyrs
Commemoration of Damon and Basṭāmon and their mother Sofyā
Commemoration of the Edict of Milan
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of the 40 martyrs in Alexandria (non-standard)
Commemoration of ʾAfomyā and the institution of the feast of Michael (non-standard)
Commemoration of Yoḥannǝs, bishop of Jerusalem
Commemoration of Abkǝrā, Yoḥannǝs, ʾAbṭalmā and ʾAbfilbā
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Menās in Maryuṭ
Commemoration of the seven martyrs of Tonā
Commemoration of Ḥor, ʾAbsay and Didǝrā
Commemoration of the birth of St John the Baptist
Commemorative notices for the month of Ḥamle
Commemoration of the translatio of ʾAbuqir and Yoḥannǝs
Commemoration of the martyrdom of Peter and Paul
Commemoration of Tāʾodros, bishop of the Pentapolis
Commemoration of Taʾudrās, bishop of Qorontos
Commemoration of St Ephrem the Syrian
Commemoration of Cyricus amongst the Ethiopians
Commemoration of the translatio of Judas Thaddeus
Commemorative notices for the month of Naḥāse
Commemoration of Dāwit and his brothers
Commemoration of the annunciation of Mary's birth
Commemoration of Michael among the Ethiopians
Commemoration of the transfiguration of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the mircale worked by ʾabbā Tewofilos in Alexandria
Commemoration of the Assumption of St Mary
Commemoration of the translation of Maqāryos
Commemoration of the seven sleepers of Ephesus
Commemoration of the 1030 martyrs of Alexandria
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝnyāmi and ʾAwdaksyā
Commemoration of ʾAbrǝhām, Yǝsḥaq and Yāʿqob
Commemoration of the translatio of Yǝsḥaq
Commemoration of the translatio of Yāʿqob
Commemoration of the birth of ʾAtnātiyos
Commemorative notices for the month of Ṗagʷǝmen
Commemoration of Rufāʾel, consecration of his church and miracle
Commemoration of the end of the year
